title: Hell To Earth
description: A horror modpack turning Minecraft into a world filled with fear, mystery, and darkness.
body:
# 🎃 Minecraft Horror Modpack: A Terrifying Adventure Awaits

Prepare to experience Minecraft like never before with this spine-chilling horror modpack. Dive into a world of darkness, danger, and unsettling mysteries where every step could be your last. This modpack transforms the familiar blocky landscape into a haunting survival experience, blending eerie atmospheres, horrifying creatures, and challenging mechanics to keep you on edge.

Featuring enhanced visuals, immersive audio, and terrifying surprises, this modpack is perfect for thrill-seekers and fans of survival horror.

**🔥 Go against Siren-head, Herobrine and much more...**

<details>
<summary>Spoilers (images)</summary>

![Herobrine (Credits: From The Fog modrinth page)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca217ec20ec11f278fc040ceae76867c083de880.png)

![Siren Head (Credits: Siren Head modrinth page)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ceeefdf2c864ce2319958c7e0ceebacf9ab7e660_0.webp)

</details>

Brightness set to "**Moody**" is recommended.

### ✦ Recommended shaders (already in the pack)

1. "Insanity Shader"

1. "Cursed Fog"

1. "Complementary Shaders - Reimagined"

Check out this modpack's collection: [here](https://modrinth.com/collection/vVHaWZay)

# ❓ FAQ

### 📂 Using Parts of This Modpack

Regarding parts created by me, whether they are resource-packs, mods, shaders, or any other elements, proper credit must be given when using them. This means that you must clearly credit the original creator (myself) and provide a visible link to the official Modrinth page where the content can be downloaded.

Please note that components not created by me are not managed or supported by me, and any issues or requests related to those should be addressed to their respective creators.

This applies to all uses, including streaming, video content, and any form of public content creation. Proper attribution ensures the recognition of the original work and allows others to discover and explore the modpack.

### 📦 Using the Entire Modpack

You are allowed to use the entire modpack publicly, including in projects, servers, or other public uses. While proper credit to the original creator (myself) with a visible link to the official Modrinth page is **strongly appreciated** when the modpack is used in full, it is not strictly required. However, this does not grant permission to re-upload or redistribute the modpack on any platform or website without explicit consent.

Any attempt to republish the modpack as your own or distribute it through unauthorized channels is strictly prohibited. If you wish to modify or share the modpack in any way, please contact me for approval. The goal is to ensure that the modpack remains under proper control and that all creators are respected for their work.

### ⚖️ Consequences of Non-Compliance

Failure to respect these guidelines may initially result in a polite request for compliance. However, if these conditions are not followed, it will lead to the total removal of the content in question.

- **Herobrine**: "From The Fog" by _Lunar Eclipse Studios_ - [Modrinth page](https://modrinth.com/datapack/from-the-fog)

- **The Anomaly**: "The Anomaly" by _clorobored_ - [CurseForge page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-anomaly)
- **Apollyon**: "Apollyon" by _GamerCraftZ_ - [CurseForge page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apollyon)

The shaders used are all included in the pack

Additional credits can simply be found in the **_Dependencies_** Tab.
